title: LVS Stock Tickeron detected bullish Stock Pattern: Broadening Wedge Ascending LVS on August 25, 2025, netting in a 4.83% gain over 6 days
author: tickeron_community
selftext: On August 22, 2025, A.I.dvisor detected a Broadening Wedge Ascending Pattern (Bullish) for [Las Vegas Sands Corp](https://tickeron.com/ticker/LVS/) ([LVS](https://tickeron.com/ticker/LVS/), $55.05). On August 25, 2025, A.I.dvisor confirmed the Bullish pattern, setting a target price of $57.90. 3 days later, on August 28, 2025, [LVS](https://tickeron.com/ticker/LVS/) reached the target price resulting in a +4.83% for traders who took a long position in the stock.
